patterns: what is electronics and communication engineering
what are core subjects in ece
what is the scope of ece
what can i do after ece
what is ece branch in ssit
what skills are needed for ece
responses: Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) focuses on designing, developing, and maintaining electronic systems and communication devices. In SSIT, ECE students learn subjects like analog and digital electronics, microcontrollers, communication systems, VLSI, and embedded systems. The branch offers strong career opportunities in both core companies and software industries.

patterns: what are the laboratories in ece
what labs are available for ece students
what experiments are done in ece labs
responses: The ECE department at SSIT provides well-equipped laboratories such as Analog Electronics Lab, Digital Electronics Lab, Microcontroller Lab, Communication Systems Lab, VLSI Lab, Signal Processing Lab, and Embedded Systems Lab to give students practical knowledge.

patterns: does ssit provide placement for ece
responses: The ECE department at SSIT provides good placement opportunities. Students are trained through aptitude, technical, and soft skills programs. Companies from both core and IT sectors recruit ECE students for various roles.

patterns: what kind of projects ece students do
what projects are done in ece
responses: ECE students at SSIT work on various projects such as IoT-based systems, embedded systems, robotics, communication systems, and VLSI design projects. These projects help students gain practical and industry-level experience.

responses:
B.Tech Programmes:Admissions into all the UG Programmes (B.Tech) in the college are made by the convener of the KCET, Government of KARNATAKA based on the state wide ranks obtained in the EAMCET (Engineering, Agricultural and Medical Common Entrance Test). The selection process is purely based on the marks and ranks obtained in the KCET.
 M.Tech Programmes: Admissions into the PG Programmes in the college are based on the merit / ranks / scores of candidates in the national eligibility test GATE and PGCET, conducted state wide. 
 The needed Documents were sent at their result cards on APEAMCET or GATE

best place to study in ssit
responses: SSIT has a well-developed Central Library located at the entrance of the campus. The library building has a unique globe-like structure, which makes it visually attractive and is often featured on social media. It is spacious, modern, and provides a peaceful environment for studying. The library has a large collection of books, journals, digital resources, and e-books covering engineering, science, and management subjects. It also offers internet access, reading halls, and a digital library facility to support students in their academic learning.

SSIT has a dedicated Training and Placement Cell that provides strong support for student placements. Students are trained in aptitude, technical skills, and soft skills to improve employability. Many reputed companies visit the campus for recruitment, including IT and core sector companies. The college has shown consistent placement performance, offering good career opportunities for students in both software and core engineering fields. For more details, please visit Click here.

responses: The Head of the Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) Department at SSIT is Dr. M C Chandrashekhar, Professor & Head. You can contact him via email at chandrashekharmc@ssit.edu.in.

patterns: what is the name of principal
responses: The Principal of SSIT Tumkur is Dr. M. S. Raviprakasha, Professor & Principal. You can contact him via email at principal@ssit.edu.in.
You can check the SSIT exam schedule and academic calendar here: Click here. Please refer to the academic calendar or notifications section for detailed exam dates and timetable.

patterns: Is there any scholarship based on EAMCET rank
responses: The college offers COMPLETE TUITION FEE WAIVER FOR ALL THE FOUR YEARS of the B.Tech course to students who join this college with less than 10,000 rank in KCET.

patterns: how can i reach ssit by bus
responses: SSIT provides transport facilities for students from Tumkur and nearby areas. College buses operate on multiple routes covering important locations to ensure safe and convenient travel for students. For detailed routes and timings, students can contact the college transport office.

SSIT offers multiple engineering branches with a fixed intake capacity as per university and AICTE norms. The intake for each branch, including ECE, may vary slightly each year. For exact seat intake details, please refer to the official SSIT admission section or contact the college administration.

SSIT does not enforce a strict daily uniform for students. However, students are expected to follow a decent dress code. For laboratory sessions, students are required to wear lab coats (apron) for safety and discipline.

SSIT has various committees and student bodies to support academic and extracurricular activities. These include cultural committees, technical clubs, placement and training cells, anti-ragging committee, grievance cell, and other student support groups that help in overall development.

The Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) department offers undergraduate and graduate programs in computer science, covering topics such as algorithms, data structures, programming languages, software engineering, and more.

The Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) department offers undergraduate and graduate programs focusing on electronics, communication systems, signal processing, microelectronics, and related areas.

The Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE) department offers undergraduate and graduate programs covering areas such as electrical machines, power systems, control systems, renewable energy, and more.

The Mechanical Engineering (ME) department offers undergraduate and graduate programs focusing on mechanical systems, thermal sciences, materials engineering, manufacturing processes, and related fields.

The Civil Engineering (CE) department offers undergraduate and graduate programs focusing on structural engineering, transportation engineering, environmental engineering, water resources, and related disciplines.

patterns: who is the hod of ece
who are the ECE faculty members

responses: The Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) at SSIT was started in 1980 with an initial intake of 40 students, which has now increased to 180 (as of 2024). It offers PG programmes in 'Digital Electronics' (since 2005) and 'VLSI and Embedded Systems' (since 2009). The department is AICTE approved and has been accredited 3 times!

Our ECE alumni have a strong global presence! Notable alumni include Dr. Mahadeva Prasanna (Dean/Prof at IIT Dharwad), Sumana Iyengar (Co-founder/CEO Goavega Software, USA/Bengaluru), Dr. R K Das (Principal DRIEMS), Hemanth Kumar (Founder V3Novus), and many professionals working in top tech companies like Ericsson, Symphony AI, and NXP India.

patterns: what are the achievements of ece department
responses:
The ECE Department boasts tremendous achievements: 
1. A Rs. 20,00,000 grant from VGST for the 'Cyber Security Center of Excellence Lab'. 
2. ECE students secured the 'Outstanding Student Branch Website' Award from IEEE Bangalore Section (2020-21). 
3. Multiple Best Project Awards sponsored by KSCST, including an Automated Door Opening System for COVID-19 risk reduction!

The ECE department has active MOUs with prominent tech organizations to ensure industry exposure! These include Cranes Software International Limited, Advanced Electronics Systems (ALS), MIT Square (London), MEVI Technologies LLP, TMI Systems, Blend Vidya EdTech, Innowitech Solutions, and Entuple Technologies.

patterns: what clubs are available for ece students
does ece have a technical club
responses: ECE students are highly active! The department proudly hosts the 'Parishrama Activity Club' for value-added courses, workshops, and hobby projects. Additionally, students actively participate in professional bodies like IEEE, ISTE, NSS, NCC, and the Varsity Circle, often winning prizes at national-level technical events.

patterns: what are the objectives of ece branch
responses: The ECE department aims to mold quality technocrats. Our Programme Educational Objectives (PEOs) focus on making students proficient in engineering synthesis (PEO-1), competent to pursue higher studies and research (PEO-2), and aware of new technologies for societal needs while maintaining ethical practices (PEO-3).

SSIT provides separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. The boys' hostels include HMG Hostel and Rajagruha Hostel, which offer basic amenities, Wi-Fi, dining, and security to ensure a comfortable stay for all outstation students.
